name: tessera
description: Your secure personal AI agent. Defense in depth. Zero trust by default.

scripts.dev:services: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n vault,audit,mem,skills,box,agent,gw -c magenta,blue,cyan,yellow,red,green,white "pnpm dev:vault" "pnpm dev:audit" "pnpm dev:memory" "pnpm dev:skills" "pnpm dev:sandbox" "pnpm dev:agent" "pnpm dev:gateway"
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n vault,audit,mem,skills,box,agent,gw,ui -c magenta,blue,cyan,yellow,red,green,white,bgBlue.white "pnpm dev:vault" "pnpm dev:audit" "pnpm dev:memory" "pnpm dev:skills" "pnpm dev:sandbox" "pnpm dev:agent" "pnpm dev:gateway" "pnpm dev:ui"
